details: demo-merge version 2.4.1 is affected by prototype pollution in mergeDeep(). Source -> sink -> guard: attacker-controlled JSON from JSON.parse(req.body) reaches mergeDeep(); the sink is assignment of target[key] = value; the guard is missing blocklist handling for __proto__, constructor, and prototype. This allows attacker-controlled object keys to modify object prototypes in applications that pass untrusted JSON to the merge helper.

database_specific.source: JSON.parse(req.body) -> mergeDeep() -> target[key] = value; missing __proto__/constructor/prototype blocklist
